Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class PrivacySettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.PrivacySettings2
public class PrivacySettings2 extends SObject

Java class for PrivacySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PrivacySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AuthorizationCaptureBrowser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthorizationCaptureEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthorizationCaptureIp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthorizationCaptureLocation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthorizationCustomSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthorizationLockingAndVersioning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsConfigurableUserPiiActiveEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsConsentAuditTrailEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsConsentEventStreamEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDefaultMetadataValuesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}PrivacySettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UseUmaDefaultConsentRecs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
